name: Old Dominion Freight Line
analysis: ODFL has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at $216.0753. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $216.0753, stop $201.3978, target $221.3494. Risk/reward is 0.36:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
